title: Cooper Golem Awakening
description: Modifies copper golem creation mechanics - now requires lightning rod and lightning strike to awaken. Copper chests are created separately.
body:
# Cooper Golem Awakening

A Minecraft Fabric mod that rebalances copper golem creation mechanics, making them more challenging and rewarding. Since creating a copper golem now requires real effort and strategy.

## 🔥 Key Features

- **Lightning-Powered Awakening**: Copper golems now require lightning strike to come to life instead of spawning automatically
- **Separate Chest Mechanics**: Copper chests are created independently from the golem awakening process
- **Direction-Dependent Structure**: Lightning Rod must be facing downward for proper activation
- **All Copper Variants Support**: Works with all copper block and lightning rod variants (including waxed versions)

## ⚡ How It Works

### Modified Structure
Build your copper golem structure with the Lightning Rod **facing downward**:

```
Lightning (strikes here)
    ↓
Lightning Rod (facing ↓)
    ↓
Carved Pumpkin
    ↓
Copper Block
```

### Awakening Process
1. **Build**: Construct the structure with Lightning Rod pointing down
2. **Wait**: Wait for lightning to strike your Lightning Rod
3. **Awaken**: If built correctly, the copper golem will awaken from the lightning strike!

## 🛠️ Supported Blocks

### Lightning Rods
- Lightning Rod
- Exposed Lightning Rod
- Weathered Lightning Rod
- Oxidized Lightning Rod
- All waxed variants

### Copper Blocks
- Copper Block
- Exposed Copper
- Weathered Copper
- Oxidized Copper
- All waxed variants
